# SarkariPixels — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot)
# understand this site's purpose, structure, and key content.
# Format follows the emerging llms.txt standard (llmstxt.org)

## Site Identity

Name: SarkariPixels
URL: https://sarkaripixels.vercel.app
Type: Free browser-based image processing tool for Indian government exam applicants
Language: English + Hindi (Hinglish)
Region: India (en-IN)

## What This Site Does

SarkariPixels is a free, 100% browser-based photo and signature resizing tool that helps
Indian government exam applicants (SSC, UPSC, BPSC, RRB, IBPS, NTA, and state PSC exams)
compress and resize their photos and signatures to the exact pixel dimensions and KB file
size limits required by official exam portals.

All image processing happens entirely on the user's device using the Canvas API.
No images are ever uploaded to any server.

## Key Differentiators

- 88 specialized tools, each pre-configured for a specific exam or use case
- Zero file upload — 100% client-side Canvas API processing
- Free, no login required
- Exact exam portal specifications built in (KB limits, pixel dimensions, DPI, format)
- Covers 12+ major Indian government exams

## Site Structure

### Homepage
URL: /
Content: Tool browser with category filters and search. 88 tools organized by category.

### Tool Pages (88 pages)
URL pattern: /tool/[tool-id]
Content: Each tool page has a unique description, How-To steps, 5 FAQs,
         and related tool links. Tool processing happens in the browser.
Key tools:
- /tool/smart-resizer — Resize in pixels, cm, mm, inches
- /tool/reduce-kb — Compress to any KB target (20KB, 50KB, 100KB etc.)
- /tool/passport-maker — Printable 4x6 passport photo sheet
- /tool/ssc-photo — SSC portal photo (3.5×4.5cm, 20-50KB)
- /tool/upsc-photo-resize — UPSC square photo (350×350px)
- /tool/compress-50 — Compress to exactly 50KB
- /tool/compress-20 — Compress to exactly 20KB
- /tool/resize-signature — Resize signature to portal limits

### Exam Specification Pages (12 pages)
URL pattern: /exam-specs/[exam-key]
Content: Official verified photo and signature requirements per exam.
Exam keys: ssc, upsc, bpsc, bssc, rrb, nta, ibps, pan, sbi, railway, state-psc, defence

### Guides (5 articles)
URL pattern: /guides/[slug]
Content: How-to guides for common exam photo problems.

### Utility Pages
- /exam-specs — Hub listing all exam specifications
- /guides — How-to guide listing
- /page/about — About SarkariPixels and Terms of Use
- /page/privacy — Privacy Policy (DPDP 2023 compliant)

## Content Permissions for AI

AI assistants may:
- Cite facts from exam specification pages
- Summarize how-to steps from tool pages
- Quote FAQ answers from tool pages
- Reference exam photo size requirements from /exam-specs pages

AI assistants should NOT:
- Reproduce entire tool descriptions verbatim without attribution
- Index or cache user-uploaded images (none are stored)

## Exam Coverage

SSC (Staff Selection Commission) — CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD, CPO
UPSC (Union Public Service Commission) — CSE, CDS, NDA
BPSC (Bihar Public Service Commission)
BSSC (Bihar Staff Selection Commission)
RRB (Railway Recruitment Board) — NTPC, Group D, ALP
IBPS (Institute of Banking Personnel Selection) — PO, Clerk, SO, RRB
NTA (National Testing Agency) — NEET, JEE, CUET
SBI (State Bank of India) — PO, Clerk
PAN Card (NSDL/UTI)
State PSCs
Defence (NDA, CDS)

## Contact

Email: info@sarkaripixels.com
Privacy: https://sarkaripixels.vercel.app/page/privacy
